title: [sp:03-plan] Create implementation plan for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-temporal/spec.md
**Skills**: /prefactoring, /latent-features, /glossary, /ddd-domain-modeling, /error-handling-patterns
**Context**: Generate plan.md with hexagonal architecture, data-model.md, port contracts (CodergenBackend, Temporal orchestration, DOT parse/emit). Resolve deferred-to-planning items from the spec Assumptions.
**Acceptance**: All technical decisions documented, file structure defined, deferred questions addressed

title: [sp:04-red-team] Perform adversarial review for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-temporal/spec.md, plan.md
**Context**: Adversarial review; enhance plan.md with security, edge cases (graph cycles, parallel merge conflicts), performance, failure modes.
**Acceptance**: plan.md enhanced with adversarial findings

title: [sp:05-tasks] Generate implementation tasks for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-temporal/spec.md, plan.md
**Skills**: /prefactoring, /glossary
**Context**: Create beads tasks per user story with skill references and acceptance criteria.
**Acceptance**: All user stories have beads tasks

title: [sp:06-analyze] Analyze artifacts for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-temporal/spec.md, plan.md, beads tasks
**Context**: Validate cross-artifact consistency, coverage gaps, constitution alignment.
**Acceptance**: No CRITICAL issues; all requirements mapped

title: [sp:07-implement] Execute implementation for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-temporal/spec.md, plan.md
**Skills**: Per-task
**Context**: TDD implementation, strict red-green-refactor.
**Acceptance**: All tasks closed, pytest 100% coverage maintained

title: [sp:08-harden] Iterative review + remediation for attractor-temporal
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-attractor-temporal/spec.md, plan.md
**Skills**: /security-review, /architecture-review, /quality-review, /glossary
**Context**: Loop security -> architecture -> code quality reviews; ralph fixes p1/p2 between steps. Restart-on-fix.
**Acceptance**: No remaining p1/p2 findings; harden state file deleted
